name: alpha-wiki
description: Alpha-wiki marketplace — LLM-maintained wiki plugin (Karpathy + OmegaWiki inspired)

plugins.name: alpha-wiki
plugins.description: Bootstraps an LLM-maintained wiki into any project: 8 skills (init, ingest, query, lint, evolve, status, spawn-agent, render), typed cross-links, schema evolution, Obsidian-compatible.
